SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Trial phase", "Class of ICI", "Monotherapy/combination", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Class of ICI" = 'CTLA-4' AND "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Trial phase" = 'Phase 3' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';
